class.name: tb3_rrt_rviz_plugin/SetRRTStartTool
class.description: Click on the map to set the RRT planner start pose. Click to place position, hold and drag to set heading. Publishes geometry_msgs/PoseStamped on /start_pose. Shortcut: S

class.name: tb3_rrt_rviz_plugin/SetRRTGoalTool
class.description: Click on the map to set the RRT planner goal pose. Click to place position, hold and drag to set heading. Publishes geometry_msgs/PoseStamped on /goal_pose, which immediately triggers the RRT planner node. Shortcut: G
